name: BARXY
description: XY Bar chart visualization - displays 2D data as bar graph
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="BARXY" blockType="d" simulationFunctionName="BARXY_sim" simulationFunctionType="SCILAB" style="BARXY">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="5" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="-15"/>
    <data line="1" column="0" value="15"/>
    <data line="2" column="0" value="-15"/>
    <data line="3" column="0" value="15"/>
    <data line="4" column="0" value="1"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="1" width="4">
    <data line="0" column="0" realPart="-15.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="1" realPart="15.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="2" realPart="-15.0"/>
    <data line="0" column="3" realPart="15.0"/>
  </ScilabDouble>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="200.0" y="200.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: Has 1 ControlPort (event trigger) - unique for scope/visualization
Has 2 ExplicitInputPorts for X and Y data
criticalRules: Has 1 ControlPort (event trigger) - unique for scope/visualization
Has 2 ExplicitInputPorts for X and Y data
exprs: [xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, bar thickness]
